reviews.review_description:
I thought this game was going to be good by the trailer I made look but the game is too short it's not really scary going to get like practically one jump scare it's not really nothing to do indicate really is boring not enough variety the graphics is okay The games too short for the price you charge for it was kind of boring it's not what I expected to be I would love a refund if I can get a refund back it feel like it was a it's not worth $10 for the time you get out of it soon I brought it I feel like it was already over as soon as I started the game it was over before I knew it I'm thinking something else and morph going to happen but nothing happened wasting my money if it would have been like two or $3 maybe it'd be worth it for the time the game last if it's too short it's not enough or already in it not enough scares it was it's like it's a cheap gimmick game and it cash grab 
I really didn't like it after now that I see how it is it's not what I expected and I'm looking to be scared and terrified and stuff happening but it was just a cheap jumpscare
